creator: jan@mecinus.com
text:
(In reply to Nicolas Herry from comment #5)
Hi, author of ncgopher here. Sorry, I was not aware of this discussion. I've just pushed a feature branch FEATURE-RUSTLS that uses rustls and should therefore no longer be dependent on OpenSSL. If that works for you, I can create a new release. I only did a quick test and it seems to compile fine on FreeBSD 14.2 with rust 1.83.0.
